examples: Paint your entryway or hallway a fun color, the same for the kitchen and small nooks.
A row or two of pegs makes use of wall space and frees up the entryway floor and closet.
Then suddenly they had, and he was standing in the entryway holding his finger to the buzzer.
One turn from a busy street and they were enveloped by a shady, tree-lined entryway.
His dogs, Rocky and Apollo, took advantage of the open entryway and set out on adventure.
